emails.subject: Re: Redployment
emails.body: Re: Redployment Rehman, Thanks for you message. My group hires almost exclusively people with background in quantitative disciplines (math, physics) or computer programming. I shall send your resume to some other units in the company that are looking for people with good skills and experience. Vince Rehman Sharif@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 02/27/2001 11:17 AM
